name: EigenLayer Restaking with AVS Selection
description: Deposit stETH (or other LSTs) into EigenLayer and delegate to a curated operator. Earns ETH staking yield + AVS rewards (typically 4-12% extra APR on top of base 3-4% staking). Slashing-aware operator shortlist included.
use_case: Agent stakes 32 ETH via Lido for stETH (3.5% APR). Restakes via EigenLayer to EigenDA AVS = +6% restaking rewards. Total: 9.5% APR on ETH. Slashing risk capped at 1% per epoch.

verification.criteria: Post-tx: agent address has non-zero shares in stETH strategy AND is delegated to one of the approved operators in the AVS shortlist.
